arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso Named the 'Underrated' Englishman Who Could've Played for Spain in 2010
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso once named the 'underrated' England player he believed was good enough to play for Spain.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal impostor fools excited fan while casually walking down the street of Barcelona
arts.sum: A viral video making the rounds on social media shows a fan excitedly approaching what he believed to be Lamine Yamal, the rising teenage sensation of FC Barcelona, only to realize later that he had been completely fooled by an impostor. The lookalike, casually strolling through the streets of Barcelona with sunglasses on, played his role perfectly, making the unsuspecting fan believe he had just met the young football star.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'identify Virgil van Dijk replacement' as Reds prepare to 'battle' Real Madrid for teenage superstar
arts.sum: Liverpool are allegedly battling Real Madrid for the signature of in-demand Bournemouth centre-back Dean Huijsen.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'close in' on HUGE first summer transfer as double deal for Van Dijk replacement lined up
arts.sum: Liverpool are aware they may have a lot of work to do in the transfer market to build on this campaign with a number of first team players on course to leave this summer, including the out-of-contract trio Trent Alexander-Arnold, Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk. Liverpool 'close in' on HUGE first summer transfer as double deal for Van Dijk replacement lined up

arts.ttl: Netherlands v Spain, Italy v Germany, Greece v Scotland, and more: Nations League – live
arts.sum: Nations League updates from 7.45pm GMT kick-offs Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And mail Scott Steve Clarke talks to BBC Scotland: “Come into the stadium and you’re buzzing already … was tempted to go to a back five but decided to stick with the four … the four over the group stage worked well … we created a little bit more … more midfield players on the pitch … it is a very quick start on a Thursday … the only time I had all the players on the pitch was on Wednesday just before we flew to Greece so we didn’t have a lot of time to change the system … so we stuck with what we worked on for the previous six games.” Steve Clarke sticks to four at the back … by the looks of it, given how the returning Kieran Tierney is on the bench. There are just two changes to the team that started the dramatic 2-1 win in Poland last November: Lewis Ferguson and Che Adams step up with Ben Doak and Lyndon Dykes missing out altogether. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: David Raya hails ‘unstoppable’ Arsenal teammate – ‘Very intelligent’ player deserves praise
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya has hailed ‘unstoppable’ Mikel Merino, praising the midfielder for his adaptation into a false nine. Marca cover comments from the Arsenal goalkeeper today after an appearance on La Tribu, where he discussed various matters ahead of the international break. arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk contract latest: Are Liverpool running out of time to renew captain as Paris Saint-Germain links emerge?
arts.sum: Liverpool's window in which to renew to the contract of captain Virgil van Dijk is narrowing amidst speculation the defender could join Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star ruled out of Spain clash through injury
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has been ruled out of his country’s next outing on the international front. The player in question? Ferran Torres.…
